education.school_name: Nanjing University of Information Science and Technology

highlighted_projects.description: Designed and implemented an end-to-end data pipeline on Azure to ingest, transform, and analyze data for business reporting. Built data ingestion workflows using Azure Data Factory to extract data from SQL Server and store it in ADLS Gen2 following a medallion architecture (bronze, silver, gold). Transformed and optimized data using Azure Databricks (PySpark) with Delta Lake format, and enabled analytics through Azure Synapse serverless SQL. Developed interactive dashboards in Power BI to deliver actionable insights, and integrated Azure Key Vault and Active Directory for secure data access and pipeline management.
highlighted_projects.name: End to End Azure Data Engineering Project

highlighted_projects.description: Developed and implemented an ETL pipeline for an E-Hospital chatbot system to process and structure medical data from multiple sources. Extracted and transformed XML-based medical data into structured CSV formats using Python (Pandas), ensuring data quality through validation and cleaning. Collaborated with a cross-functional team to integrate the chatbot into an existing platform, enabling efficient access to healthcare information. Delivered project presentations and a promotional demo to communicate system functionality and impact.
highlighted_projects.name: E-Hospital Medical Chatbot System

description: Designed and implemented a Linux-based cluster monitoring agent to collect and analyze system metrics across multiple hosts.
Developed Bash scripts to extract hardware specifications (CPU, memory, disk) and real-time usage data, and stored structured data in a PostgreSQL database for centralized monitoring.
Containerized the database using Docker for portability and simplified deployment.
Automated data collection using cron jobs, enabling continuous tracking of system performance and resource utilization.
jarvis_projects.name: Cluster Monitor

description: Performed data analytics on London Gift Shop (LGS) retail transaction data using Python, Pandas, and NumPy to uncover customer purchasing patterns and support targeted marketing strategies.
Cleaned and transformed retail sales data by handling missing values, filtering cancelled transactions, and calculating revenue metrics for analysis.
Applied RFM customer segmentation and created Matplotlib visualizations to identify high-value customers and generate insights that could benefit the business.
jarvis_projects.name: Python Data Analytics

description: Performed data analytics using PySpark on Apache Zeppelin running on a GCP Dataproc Hadoop cluster, leveraging Spark SQL and distributed DataFrame processing.

Built an ETL pipeline following the Medallion Architecture (Bronze, Silver, and Gold) in Azure Databricks to ingest, clean, and analyze fraud detection data, create dashboards from gold tables, and orchestrate automated workflows using Databricks Jobs.

Built a DLT pipeline following the Medallion Architecture (Bronze, Silver, and Gold) in Databricks to automate stock market data ingestion, transformation, dashboard reporting, and workflow orchestration.
jarvis_projects.name: Spark

name: Jiahui Yang

bullets: Microsoft Certified: Azure Data Engineer Associate (2024)
others.title: Certificates

professional_experience.description: Worked in an Agile environment following GitFlow-based development workflows to deliver hands-on projects in Python, SQL, Linux, Apache Spark, Databricks, and cloud platforms, including ETL pipelines and data analytics solutions.
professional_experience.title: Data Engineer/Software Developer

professional_experience.description: Performed end-to-end data processing and feature engineering on financial datasets of over 5,000 mutual fund schemes using Python (Pandas), including data cleaning, normalization, and preparation for analysis. Developed a data-driven scoring model to identify top-performing funds based on return and risk metrics. Designed interactive Power BI dashboards to visualize key financial indicators and support data-driven investment decision-making.
professional_experience.title: Data Analytics Internship

summary: Early-career engineer with a Master's degree in Electrical and Computer Engineering and a Bachelor's degree in Computer Science. Skilled in Python and SQL, with experience building end-to-end ETL pipelines and designing cloud-based solutions on the Azure platform. Proven ability to collaborate with cross-functional teams to deliver reliable, scalable solutions, with a strong focus on efficiency, quality, and continuous learning.
